title: Projects
text:
Expense Analysis Dashboard


Developed a dashboard to analyze monthly operating costs and identify spending trends.


Tools: Excel, Power Query, Power BI


Result: Improved visibility into operating expenses and supported budgeting decisions.




Budget vs Actual Analysis


Analyzed budget versus actual performance to identify variances and provide financial insights.


Tools: Excel


Result: Supported financial planning and improved variance analysis.

title: CV
text:
Accounting and finance professional with over 10 years of experience in financial reporting, budgeting, and business operations.
Experienced in working within international environments, including a French pharmaceutical company and a German manufacturing firm. Strong background in supporting financial decision-making and improving business processes.
Currently expanding my skill set in data analytics to enhance financial planning and analysis (FP&A).

title: About Me
text:
Hello, I’m Saori Kikuchi.
I have over 10 years of experience in accounting and finance within international organizations, including a French pharmaceutical company and a German manufacturing firm. I have worked in both corporate and accounting firm environments, supporting financial decision-making and ensuring compliance with accounting standards.
In recent years, I have developed a strong interest in data analytics and how it can enhance financial planning and analysis (FP&A). I enjoy using tools such as Excel, Power Query, and Power BI to analyze data, identify trends, and support more informed business decisions.

title: About Me
text:
Professional Background
My experience includes:

Financial reporting and monthly/annual closing
Budgeting and cost analysis
Cash flow management and forecasting
ERP system implementation (SAP,JDEdward,and D365)
Collaboration with international headquarters (Finance, Tax, R&D)

title: About Me
text:
Career Goals
My goal is to transition into a role that combines finance and data analytics, particularly in FP&A or business analysis.
I aim to leverage my accounting background together with data-driven insights to improve financial performance, support strategic planning, and contribute to more efficient business operations.

title: About Me
text:

Finance & Business Tools - SAP, JD Edwards, D365 - Excel (Advanced), Power Query, Power BI - Financial reporting, budgeting, cost analysis
Data Analytics (Currently Developing) - Python (pandas, data cleaning, basic analysis) - SQL (basic querying, data extraction) - R (RStudio, basic statistical analysis) - GitHub (version control and project management)
